title: kosmeo #2885
definition:
1) to put in order, arrange, make ready, prepare
 2) to ornament, adore
 3) metaph. to embellish with honour, gain honour
nasbUsage:

 2) to ornament, adore
 3) metaph. to embellish with honour, gain honour

    NASB:  to order, arrange:
